title: Ward feedback meeting:  Residents encouraged to participate
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn Municipality has released the official schedule for the upcoming Ward Feedback Meetings set to take place throughout August.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn Municipality has released the official schedule for the upcoming Ward Feedback Meetings set to take place throughout August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These meetings are an important platform for community engagement, allowing residents to stay informed about developments in their wards and to raise any concerns or suggestions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meetings will start at 18:00 and will be led by the respective ward councillor.","html":"Meetings will start at 18:00 and will be led by the respective ward councillor."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meeting dates and venues:","html":"Meeting dates and venues:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 4 August: Ward 1/7 - New Council Building (Johan Fourie)","html":"• 4 August: Ward 1/7 - New Council Building (Johan Fourie)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 5 August: Ward 3 - New Council Building (James du Preez)","html":"• 5 August: Ward 3 - New Council Building (James du Preez)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 6 August: Ward 2 - New Council Building (Johan Duvenhage)","html":"• 6 August: Ward 2 - New Council Building (Johan Duvenhage)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 7 August: Ward 4 - Thusong Centre Hall (Nomsa Jaxa)","html":"• 7 August: Ward 4 - Thusong Centre Hall (Nomsa Jaxa)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 11 August: Ward 5 - Thusong Centre Hall (Abraham Tiemie)","html":"• 11 August: Ward 5 - Thusong Centre Hall (Zoë Tyatya)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 18 August: Ward 9 - Dysselsdorp Community Hall ( Ferlicia Abrahams)","html":"• 18 August: Ward 9 - Dysselsdorp Community Hall ( Ferlicia Abrahams)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 19 August: Ward 10 - Dysselsdorp Community Hall (Liluth van Rooyen)","html":"• 19 August: Ward 10 - Dysselsdorp Community Hall (Liluth van Rooyen)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 20 August: Ward 11 - Blomnek Community Hall (Jan van der Ross)","html":"• 20 August: Ward 11 - Blomnek Community Hall (Jan van der Ross)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 21 August: Ward 12 - New Council Building (Ryk Wildschut)","html":"• 21 August: Ward 12 - New Council Building (Ryk Wildschut)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• 25 August: Ward 13 -
